flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Odessa College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.3k → $2.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Odessa College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $4.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Odessa College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (29.9% → 37.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Odessa College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $7.8k).
